prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Mazda AJ-V6 (2.5L MZR DISI Turbo)** from the **2007-2012 CX-9**, retaining the **FS5A-EL 5-speed automatic transmission** but reinforcing it with a **PPG Stage 2 clutch pack** and a **Peloquin LSD** for improved torque handling. The AJ-V6 will be fitted with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger**, a **Mazdaspeed intercooler**, and a **custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe** paired with a **Cobb Accessport** for a **350whp/380wtq** target on **E85 fuel** with a **Walbro 450LPH fuel pump** and **ID1000x injectors**.

Full **BC Racing BR Type ER** coilover suspension with **Swift Springs 8K front/6K rear** and **polyurethane bushings** (Energy Suspension 9.5111G) to eliminate body roll, paired with **Cusco 22mm front/18mm rear sway bars** and **Whiteline adjustable end links** for chassis rigidity. The **rear torsion beam** will be reinforced with a **custom tubular subframe brace** from **Mazdaspeed Motorsports**.

Braking system upgrade to **StopTech ST-60 6-piston front calipers** with **355mm 2-piece rotors** and **Hawk HT-10 brake pads**, paired with **DBA 5000 Series rear rotors** and **Wilwood Dynalite rear calipers**. The **brake master cylinder** will be replaced with a **Wilwood 7:1 ratio unit** for improved pedal feel, and the **brake lines** will be upgraded to **Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel braided lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 MPV-specific widebody kit** (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** to fit **20x9.5 ET+15 front and 20x11 ET+20 rear wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R 255/30/20 and 295/25/20 tires**. The kit will be painted in **Mazda Soul Red Crystal** with **matte black accents** and **custom gold pinstriping**.

**Seibon Carbon Kevlar hood** (MPV-specific, not a generic JDM hood) with **functional dual 3" carbon fiber vents** for heat extraction, paired with a **custom carbon fiber front splitter** from **Varis Japan** and a **custom aluminum rear diffuser** with **dual 4" exhaust outlets** for the **custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust system** (resonated mid-pipe with **Burns Stainless mufflers**).

**Full interior overhaul** with **Recaro SRD-E fixed-back seats** (retaining the MPV’s 7-seater layout but replacing the front two with **Sparco 6-point harnesses**), a **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** on a **NRG quick-release hub**, and a **custom roll cage** (8-point, **Autopower bolt-in** with **chrome-moly tubing**) integrated with a **custom center console** housing a **Motec C127 dash display** and **AEM CD-7 data logger**. The rear seats will be reupholstered in **Alcantara with red stitching** to match the **custom door cards** (retrimmed with **Dynamat sound deadening** and **LED ambient lighting**).
